text.title: Proposal Red Team Checklist Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure for one red-team session: scaffold → populate → run → record outcome → quarterly review.

step.name: scaffold
step.input: Last quarter's checklist + current proposal draft
step.action: Run `scaffold-artefact`. Copy the canonical skeleton (`templates/skeleton.md`). Pre-fill `header.owner`, `header.mode`, `header.version`. Set `last_reviewed` to today only at step 5.

step.name: populate-evidence
step.input: Proposal draft + incident corpus + WBS + risk register
step.action: Run `populate-evidence-fields`. For each pause-point fill 5-9 items. Each item gets executor + artefact + killer_anchor referencing a real incident_id / postmortem / policy. No decorative items.
step.decision-gate: Run validator after population; reject items missing any of executor/artefact/killer_anchor.

step.name: run-session
step.input: Populated checklist + 1-hour calendar slot with architect + delivery manager
step.action: Walk the checklist per mode: DO-CONFIRM (perform task, verify ticked) OR READ-DO (perform action, tick). Capture findings per item.

step.name: record-outcome
step.action: For each finding, decide: (a) fix proposal before send, (b) accept with explicit assumption, (c) defer to red-team next cycle. Update SOW or attach assumption log.

step.name: quarterly-review
step.input: Last quarter of session findings + removed items + outcome data
step.action: Run `outcome-review-synthesis`. Identify items that fired zero findings in 3 cycles — propose removal. Identify new incidents → propose new items. Update `last_reviewed`.
step.decision-gate: If `last_reviewed` would still be > 90 days, defer next session until refresh complete (r5-review-cadence).
